ops.text:
E28 — label-refinement retrain. Standard incumbent SFT recipe; ONLY the training pool changes (E20 cleaned labels + E21 per-pair session weights). Tinker cap $9 (SpendGuard). Harness /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E28/bin/{build_view,train}.py.

PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL:
Inputs (read-only snapshot _base-20260719): base watcher train = 6731 pairs (3418 pos / 3313 neg), 813 sessions. Incumbent probs at eval/probs/v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48.json (AUC 0.9316896744944222) on the frozen 628-row watcher sentinel frame.
- E20 cleaned labels: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E20/out/cleaned-labels.parquet (5475 rows, 37 changed).
- E21 session weights: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E21/out/session-weights.parquet (per-PAIR weight=1/within-session char-5gram J0.8 cluster size; sum=4019; ESS 4019/6731; keyed by pair `id`, unique 6731). Confirmed via E21 ledger 40a5139: example-weight (loss deflation of redundant pairs) is the correct semantics — NOT sampling weights.

PLAN: (1) build_view.py real-mode -> rebuilt watcher/train.parquet (labels overridden by E20, weight column from E21). (2) train.py --weight-mode example-weight --spend-cap-usd 9.0 -> incumbent SFT -> sentinel AUC on frozen 628 frame; PERSIST new per-row probs. (3) paired DeLong delta+CI+rho vs incumbent probs; card-rule verdict (actionable iff paired 95% CI excludes 0 AND |delta|>=paired MDE=2.8016*SE_delta_paired; else within-noise-floor). Unpaired watcher MDE floor 0.0453.

SHAPE CHANGE DISCOVERED BEFORE SPENDING (dry-run validated plumbing with base-schema stand-ins only, so real E20/E21 schemas were never exercised):
1. E20 schema: build_view.load_cleaned_labels requires cols id/label; actual E20 has dedup_key/cleaned_is_steering/label_changed. Real run crashes 'missing columns [id,label]'. dedup_key==watcher id (E21 ledger), cleaned_is_steering int 0/1 = label.
2. E20 coverage: 5475 dedup_keys cover only the 3418 base POSITIVES; 3313 negatives uncovered -> default require_full_labels=True crashes. Only 33 of 37 changed labels land on the watcher frame and truly flip base label (4 on non-watcher dedup_keys). Negatives correctly keep base label (E20 only re-judged positives).
3. E21 weight join: weight is per-PAIR (id), build_view.load_session_weights joins by session_id (last-write-wins collapse) -> WRONG weight for 3754/6731 rows (55.8%), silent (no crash, E21 parquet has session_id+weight cols). Correct join is by id.

RESOLUTION (all faithful, in-bounds, in my own out/ — no harness edit, no live-data write): adapt E20 -> id/label parquet; run build_view --allow-partial-labels; OVERWRITE rebuilt weight column with correct per-pair E21 weights joined by id (train.py.id_to_weight reads weight by id, so example-weight then threads correct per-pair loss weights). Verify build_report + sum(weight)==4019 before the $9 train step. Returning early for orchestrator sign-off on this approach before spending.
